free_text: Activation cross sections of radionuclides produced
by alpha induced reactions on NatCd up to 40 MeV for
Natural Cd foils (15 um thick, 99.9 % purity). The Rh
foil (6 um thick) and Al foil (18 um thick) were used
as the beam energy degrader and catcher.
The alpha beam current was monitored with 15 um thick
A 50% relative efficiency detector with 1.8 keV
Four stacks were irradiated for 40 minutes
each. Two with 28 MeV alpha beams at 188 nA and 236 nA,
and two with 40 MeV alpha beams at 62 nA and 87 nA.

The total uncertainty in the measured cross
Contribution of 111gIn (2.8047 d) decay is very low
as counting of 111mCd was completed within 3-4 h from
Contribution of 115mCd (44.56 d) decay is negligible
as counting of 336.244 keV of 115mIn was done within
